dataset: Web3 Accelerator Public Mentor Threads & VC-Style Opinions (2026)
note_for_super_agent: Public X threads are the best proxy for how mentors think/judge. Use these to simulate scoring (e.g., 'greenfield vs iterative' from Adam, 'founder traits' from Qiao). Most other programs rely on private 1:1s. Colosseum + Alliance have the richest public data.

Colosseum Arena / Frontier (Solana).description: Largest Solana hackathon + accelerator. Judges evaluate pitches, demos, traction publicly via X threads.
Colosseum Arena / Frontier (Solana).public_threads_summary: Highly active public feedback. Billy solicits projects and gives direct reply feedback. Adam shares explicit frameworks (greenfield vs iterative innovation) and replies with PMF advice.

key_mentors_with_threads.name: Billy | attn.markets

threads.content: @Solana x @Colosseum Frontier applicants…. you know the drill :)
threads.summary: Direct call-to-action for Colosseum applicants to share projects + get feedback (quotes Dave Hsu's detailed Notion advice on team/market/product/distribution).

threads.content: hitting bit close to home... im bullish on founders actively seeking feedback like @muse_jp_sol... re public list of participants: /projects tab...
threads.summary: Praises feedback-seeking founders; shares Colosseum resources.

threads.content: would need some market research on that. EUR/CHF denominated yields... may be good enough to just add a swap...

key_mentors_with_threads.overall_opinion_lens: Founders who seek feedback aggressively win; brag with context; ship MVPs; focus on real traction.

key_mentors_with_threads.name: Adam
key_mentors_with_threads.role: Phantom devtools + SteelCitySolana organizer + Colosseum mentor

threads.content: The way I think about @colosseum projects is that there’s essentially 2 kinds imo — greenfield innovation products vs iterative innovation products...
threads.summary: Full framework: greenfield needs cult members + evangelists; iterative needs high-volume customer closes + obvious value prop.

threads.content: Good q. The reality is this is a spectrum... onchain options are kind of in the middle. Ultimately you need a good amount of organic users to give you a feedback loop and liquidity...
threads.summary: Nuanced spectrum advice + warns against airdrop farmers.

key_mentors_with_threads.overall_opinion_lens: Differentiate greenfield vs iterative early. Evidence of PMF depends on category. Organic users > fake signals.

Alliance DAO (Multi-chain / Crypto).description: Top remote crypto accelerator + founder community. 9-week program with heavy mentorship.
Alliance DAO (Multi-chain / Crypto).public_threads_summary: Qiao Wang (@QwQiao) is extremely vocal with YC-style founder advice, productivity insights, and investment criteria.

key_mentors_with_threads.name: Qiao Wang

threads.content: didnt see this coming a year ago, but i went from spending 0% to >50% of my time coding... the software engineer of the future will be more of an architect and enabler, and less of a coder.
threads.summary: Major productivity shift due to AI tools (4x → 10x median in cohorts).

threads.content: in public markets u want to identify businesses with such wide moats that even idiots can run them. in private markets the trick is to find founders whose sheer force of will can turn avg ideas into winning businesses.
threads.summary: Founder willpower > idea quality in early-stage crypto.

threads.content: question i ask technical founders in every @alliance cohort: 'how much productivity boost have u experienced since chatgpt?' ... median in the current cohort is ~10x.
threads.summary: AI productivity step-function in recent cohorts.

key_mentors_with_threads.overall_opinion_lens: Invest in 'autistic traits + childhood trauma' founders (contrarian thinking + drive). Force of will beats perfect ideas. Stay lean, solve small problems first, be brutally honest.

Solaris Accelerator (Solana).public_threads_summary: Limited public X threads; mostly private 1:1s and workshops.
Solaris Accelerator (Solana).overall_opinion_lens: Execution velocity, Solana composability, regional (Chinese/global) scaling. Overlaps with Colosseum judges (e.g. Lily Liu).

Solana Incubator (Solana Labs).public_threads_summary: Closed program — almost zero public mentor threads.
Solana Incubator (Solana Labs).overall_opinion_lens: Deep Solana-native technical integration + strategic alignment.

Stellar x CV Labs Accelerator.public_threads_summary: Brand-new program — no public mentor feedback threads yet (mostly announcements).
Stellar x CV Labs Accelerator.overall_opinion_lens: Institutional-grade: real-world payments/RWA traction, regulatory readiness, cross-border scalability.

a16z Crypto Startup School / CSX.public_threads_summary: a16z team posts high-level 'Big Ideas' and general founder advice; no granular public reply-style threads in recent data.
a16z Crypto Startup School / CSX.overall_opinion_lens: Ambitious product vision, category leadership, long-term crypto primitives.

Binance Labs Accelerator.public_threads_summary: Limited public VC-style threads from mentors.

Outlier Ventures Base Camp.public_threads_summary: Thematic posts on DePIN/Post-Web, but few specific founder-trait threads.
Outlier Ventures Base Camp.overall_opinion_lens: Token design, verifiability, community + deep tech.

Lightspeed Launch (Solana).public_threads_summary: Limited public threads; overlaps with Colosseum/Superteam style.

Encode x Solana / Superteam Regional Acc.public_threads_summary: Superteam leads (Cap, Kuka, Aditya) post session recaps and encouragement.
Encode x Solana / Superteam Regional Acc.overall_opinion_lens: Community execution, regional adoption, practical GTM + non-stop shipping.

usage_for_super_agent: Query by program → instantly get the mentor's exact public opinion style. Cross-reference Colosseum (practical PMF frameworks) with Alliance (founder personality traits) for richer simulations.
